title: xorg-x11-drv-wacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.0.0-4]
- Fix axis inversion on the first relative dial  (RHEL-106467)

[1.0.0-3]
- Map ABS_THROTTLE to ring2 on all dualring devices (RHEL-106467)

[1.0.0-2]
- Add support for Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen (RHEL-106467)
full_text:
[1.0.0-4]
- Fix axis inversion on the first relative dial  (RHEL-106467)

[1.0.0-3]
- Map ABS_THROTTLE to ring2 on all dualring devices (RHEL-106467)

[1.0.0-2]
- Add support for Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen (RHEL-106467)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15892.html
